Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Temple President.

Other · asked by user [] · 2008-01-02 · 2 answers
Can someone,working a 9-5 normal job outside become a Temple president in Iskcon?
Such situation can cause great weakness of the Yatra,as the person dont have sufficient time to deal with the many problems and events of the temple.[He has also to look after his children/wife/ go to the supermarket,watch TV etc...]

PS. I understand that some temples have closed definitely....due to absence of devotees...or indifference/mismanagement!
user [13] · 2008-01-03
Balaramadas, the answer to your question is yes.
user [1] · 2008-01-03
This is not a question. To denounce go through the proper channels and if those fail, do a campaign, but not here, please.
